tileCalculator.title: Tile calculator
tileCalculator.description: Enter each room's dimensions to calculate area, tile quantity, waste, and cost for floors, walls, and skirting.

tileCalculator.dimensionsHint: Height is only required when wall tiles are needed.
tileCalculator.materialsHint: Choose the tile size and orientation for each area.
tileCalculator.skirtEnabledHint: Door widths are deducted from the room perimeter.
tileCalculator.multiWallHint: Allocate rows between dark, accent, and light tiles.
tileCalculator.pricingHint: Costs update immediately when a unit price changes.
tileCalculator.wallTypesHint: Tiles per row are rounded up from the room perimeter.
tileCalculator.openingsHint: Opening area is deducted from walls; door width is deducted from skirting.
tileCalculator.noOpenings: No doors or windows need to be deducted for this room.

electricalLabels.title: Electrical cabinet labels
electricalLabels.description: Design, preview, and print circuit labels using the breaker module's actual dimensions.
electricalLabels.deviceDescription: Choose the product range to calculate label widths from its actual module size.
electricalLabels.moduleHint: Label width = module count × {width} mm − cutting clearance. For an RCBO, use the occupied module count rather than pole count alone.
electricalLabels.circuitsDescription: Set the name, module count, quantity, and an optional identification color for each circuit.
electricalLabels.appearanceDescription: Adjust the cut size and optional color treatment before printing.
electricalLabels.printHint: In print settings, select A4, 100% or Actual size, and disable Fit to page. Print one test label first.

ai.restockHint: Suggested purchases from the last 30 days of sales velocity.
ai.assistantNotice: Assistant preview — connect an AI provider (API key) to get real answers.
ai.actionNotice: Action framework preview - AI drafts, writes audit, and waits for confirmation before mutating data.

help.title: AI guide
help.subtitle: Use AI to query sales, stock, and draft operational actions faster.
help.itemAsk: Ask directly about revenue, inventory, best sellers, or low-stock items.
help.itemAction: Choose actions such as Create invoice, Order stock, Receive stock, or Stock in so AI drafts with the right context.
help.itemAttach: Attach images, PDFs, CSV, or XLSX files so AI can extract details before drafting.
help.itemAudit: Data-changing actions always require preview and confirmation; AI will not add stock or create records before approval.

ai.assistantEmpty: Ask about sales, stock, or what to restock.
ai.posEmpty: Use quick POS commands, check stock, or create a cart draft.
ai.placeholderReply: AI provider not configured yet — answers will appear once an API key is enabled.

suggestions.posFindLowStockCart: Find low-stock items in the cart
suggestions.receiveRobusta: Receive 20 cartons of Robusta coffee into the main warehouse

create_invoice.label: Create invoice
create_invoice.emptyText: Send the customer, items, and quantities.
create_invoice.placeholder: Example: Walk-in customer, 2 Robusta coffees, 1 pork sandwich...
create_invoice.promptInstruction: Create a sales invoice from the following user information. Read item names and quantities to draft the sales order; do not record payment unless the user says it was paid.
create_invoice.example1: Walk-in customer: 2 Robusta coffees, 1 pork sandwich
create_invoice.example2: Nam takes 5 recessed 8W lights, sell on credit

draft_purchase_order.label: Order stock
draft_purchase_order.emptyText: Send the items to order, supplier, and warehouse if available.
draft_purchase_order.placeholder: Example: Order 20 cartons of Robusta coffee from Supplier A to the main warehouse...
draft_purchase_order.promptInstruction: Create a draft purchase order from the following user information. Only create a draft PO; do not receive stock or record payment.
draft_purchase_order.example1: Order 20 cartons of Robusta coffee from Supplier A to the main warehouse
draft_purchase_order.example2: Order 10 double 32A breakers and 5 recessed 8W lights

create_inventory_inbound.label: Receive stock
create_inventory_inbound.emptyText: Send received items, quantities, supplier, and warehouse.
create_inventory_inbound.placeholder: Example: Receive 20 cartons of Robusta coffee into the main warehouse from Supplier A...
create_inventory_inbound.promptInstruction: Create an inventory inbound receipt from the following user information. This is real stock receiving; build a preview and require confirmation before adding stock.
create_inventory_inbound.example1: Receive 20 cartons of Robusta coffee into the main warehouse from Supplier A
create_inventory_inbound.example2: Receive 5 recessed 8W lights at 90,000 from Rang Dong

create_quote.label: Create quote
create_quote.emptyText: Send customer, items, quantities, and prices if available.
create_quote.placeholder: Example: Quote Nam for 5 recessed 8W lights...
create_quote.promptInstruction: Create a quote from the following user information. Only draft a quote/POS quote; do not reduce stock or create a sales invoice.
create_quote.example2: Quote 10 double 32A breakers for Hoa Binh project

find_invoice.label: Find invoice
find_invoice.emptyText: Enter invoice code, phone, customer name, or search text.
find_invoice.placeholder: Example: Find invoice HD008236 for Nam...
find_invoice.promptInstruction: Find the invoice/order from the following user information and open the matching list/detail. Only open a review screen; do not mutate data.

edit_invoice.label: Edit/cancel invoice
edit_invoice.emptyText: Enter the order code and edit/cancel/delete request.
edit_invoice.promptInstruction: Find the correct invoice/order and build a preview for edit/cancel/delete. This is sensitive; only open a review screen first.
edit_invoice.example2: Cancel invoice HD008236 because customer returned items

sales_order.label: Create sales order
sales_order.placeholder: Example: Nam orders 5 recessed lights for tomorrow...
sales_order.promptInstruction: Create a sales order draft from the following user information. Do not take payment or mutate before confirmation.
sales_order.example1: Nam orders 5 recessed lights for tomorrow
sales_order.example2: Project customer takes 10 double 32A breakers on credit

check_stock.label: Check stock
check_stock.emptyText: Enter SKU, item name, or product group.
check_stock.promptInstruction: Open the inventory stock screen from the following user information, filtered by SKU/name if an active product matches. Do not mutate data.
check_stock.example2: Check stock for Iron grout powder

create_stocktake.label: Create stocktake
create_stocktake.placeholder: Example: Create stocktake for main warehouse...
create_stocktake.promptInstruction: Only when the user explicitly asks for stocktake creation: open the stocktake form from the following user information. Do not save yet.

adjust_stock.label: Adjust stock
adjust_stock.emptyText: Enter product, warehouse, quantity, and reason.
adjust_stock.placeholder: Example: Adjust SP004935 down by 2 because damaged...
adjust_stock.promptInstruction: Prepare a stock adjustment preview from the following user information. If no dedicated form exists, open inventory for review; do not add/subtract stock automatically.
adjust_stock.example1: Adjust SP004935 down by 2 because damaged

transfer_stock.label: Transfer stock
transfer_stock.emptyText: Enter source warehouse, target warehouse, product, and quantity.
transfer_stock.placeholder: Example: Transfer 5 SP004935 from main to secondary warehouse...
transfer_stock.promptInstruction: Prepare a stock transfer preview from the following user information. If no dedicated form exists, open inventory for review; do not transfer stock automatically.
transfer_stock.example1: Transfer 5 SP004935 from main to secondary warehouse
transfer_stock.example2: Transfer 10 recessed 8W lights to project warehouse

create_product.label: Create product
create_product.emptyText: Enter name, SKU, unit, price, and category if available.
create_product.placeholder: Example: Add product Tile adhesive 20kg SKU KDG20...
create_product.promptInstruction: Create a new product preview from the following user information and open the product form for review before saving.
create_product.example1: Add product Tile adhesive 20kg SKU KDG20 price 120,000
create_product.example2: Create product Recessed 8W light, unit piece

edit_product.label: Edit product
edit_product.emptyText: Enter SKU/name and the field to update.
edit_product.placeholder: Example: Edit SP004935 min stock to 10...
edit_product.promptInstruction: Find an active product from the following user information. Open the edit form if productId exists; otherwise open the filtered product list.

update_product_price.label: Update price
update_product_price.promptInstruction: Create a price update preview from the following user information. This is sensitive; review pricing before confirmation.

toggle_product_active.label: Activate/deactivate
toggle_product_active.emptyText: Enter product and target active/inactive status.
toggle_product_active.promptInstruction: Create an activate/deactivate product preview from the following user information. If no dedicated action exists, open the filtered product list for review.

create_customer.label: Create customer
create_customer.emptyText: Enter customer name, phone, and type if available.
create_customer.promptInstruction: Create a customer preview from the following user information and open the customer form for review before saving.
create_customer.example2: Create wholesale customer Minh Anh Company

create_supplier.label: Create supplier
create_supplier.emptyText: Enter supplier name, phone, and tax code if available.
create_supplier.placeholder: Example: Create supplier Minh Anh phone 0909123456...
create_supplier.promptInstruction: Create a supplier preview from the following user information. If no dedicated form route exists, open the supplier tab for entry/review before saving.
create_supplier.example2: Add Rang Dong supplier tax code 0100100100

check_customer_debt.label: Customer debt
check_customer_debt.emptyText: Enter customer name, phone, or code.
check_customer_debt.placeholder: Example: How much does Nam still owe?...
check_customer_debt.promptInstruction: Open customer debt/report review from the following user information. Do not record collection.
check_customer_debt.example1: How much does Nam still owe?

record_supplier_payment.label: Pay supplier
record_supplier_payment.placeholder: Example: Pay Rang Dong supplier 2,000,000 cash...
record_supplier_payment.promptInstruction: Create a supplier payment/cashbook preview from the following user information. This is financial; require strong confirmation before writing cashbook.
record_supplier_payment.example2: Bank transfer 5 million to Minh Anh supplier

today_sales_report.label: Today sales
today_sales_report.placeholder: Example: How much did we sell today?...
today_sales_report.promptInstruction: Open sales reports from the following user information. Read-only; do not mutate data.
today_sales_report.example1: How much did we sell today?

best_sellers_report.label: Best sellers
best_sellers_report.placeholder: Example: What sold best this week?...
best_sellers_report.promptInstruction: Open best-seller reports from the following user information. Read-only.

low_stock_report.label: Low stock
low_stock_report.placeholder: Example: Which products are running low?...
low_stock_report.promptInstruction: Open low-stock/inventory reports from the following user information. Read-only.

customer_purchase_report.label: Customer purchases
customer_purchase_report.placeholder: Example: How much did Nam buy this month?...
customer_purchase_report.promptInstruction: Open customer purchase reports from the following user information, filtered if a customer matches.
customer_purchase_report.example1: How much did Nam buy this month?
customer_purchase_report.example2: What did customer Minh Anh buy?

customer_profit_report.label: Profit by customer
customer_profit_report.placeholder: Example: Profit by customer Minh Anh...
customer_profit_report.promptInstruction: Open customer profit reports from the following user information, filtered if a customer matches.

slow_moving_stock_report.label: Slow-moving stock
slow_moving_stock_report.emptyText: Ask about aged or slow-selling inventory.
slow_moving_stock_report.placeholder: Example: Which stock has not sold for a while?...
slow_moving_stock_report.promptInstruction: Open reports/inventory to review slow-moving stock from the following user information. Read-only.
slow_moving_stock_report.example1: Which stock has not sold for a while?

errors.tooManyAttachments: Attach up to {max} files per message.
errors.unsupportedAttachment: {name} is not supported. Supported files: PNG, JPG, WebP, PDF, CSV, XLSX.
errors.speechUnsupported: This browser does not support speech-to-text yet.
errors.speechError: Could not hear the voice input. Try again or type it manually.
errors.attachmentUploading: Files are still uploading. Wait a moment, then send again.
errors.attachmentFailed: A file upload failed. Remove the failed file or attach it again.

session.renameDescription: The new name will be saved to AI chat history.
session.deleteDescription: This chat and its messages will be hidden from history.
session.deleteWarning: Delete "{title}"? This does not affect audit logs or business records already created.
session.uploadNotice: Uploading file. Wait until it finishes before sending.
session.exhaustedNotice: AI usage is exhausted this month. The owner can raise the limit in Settings > AI.

composer.attachmentPlaceholder: Enter a request for the attached file...
composer.openAttachmentHint: Use Open file to view this in a new tab.
composer.attachmentUnavailable: Could not open this attachment. Try reloading the chat.

preview.posDraftLines: {count} lines captured · review before sending to POS
preview.pendingConfirmation: No data changed · waiting for confirmation
preview.strongAcknowledgement: I reviewed the preview and understand the impact of this action.
preview.noMutationYet: No data changed. Review before confirming.

strong.applyPriceFormula: This may update prices in bulk. Review the price book and affected products before confirming.
strong.recordInvoicePayment: This records cash movement and invoice payment status. Reconcile the cash book after confirming.
strong.cancelInvoice: This may cancel a document, return stock, reverse debt, and affect revenue reports.
strong.createReturnRefund: This may create a return/refund, update stock, and record cash movement.
strong.sendEinvoice: This may send invoice data to the e-invoice provider and create a legal status.
strong.createCashbookEntry: This creates a cashbook transaction. Review the amount, income/expense type, and note.
strong.convertQuoteToOrder: This converts a quote into a sales order and may affect stock.
strong.createOrder: This creates a draft sales order from AI. Review the customer, line items, and total.
strong.default: This is a business-impacting action. Review the preview, warnings, and related record before confirming.

q.todaySales: How much did we sell today?

aiQuick.emptyTitle: Send text or an image for AI to draft
aiQuick.emptyDescription: AI only creates a preview you can apply to the current screen.

errors.noPreview: AI did not create a preview suitable for this screen.

preview.noMutationYet: No data has changed. Applying only fills a draft into the current screen.

purchase.description: Send a request or purchase document image. AI previews and fills a draft into this receipt.
purchase.placeholder: Example: Receive 24 LED 9W bulbs SKU LED9W at 18,000 from 3S LED into the main warehouse...
purchase.existingData: The current receipt already has data

create_stocktake.description: Send a request or count-list image. AI previews and fills the stocktake form.
create_stocktake.placeholder: Example: Count SP004935 and SP004908 in the main warehouse...

internalUse.title: AI internal issue

tables.title: Tables

modifiers.applyHint: Leave empty to apply to all items.

import.title: Import data
import.intro: Import products from KiotViet, Sapo, POS365 or any spreadsheet — CSV or Excel (.xlsx). KiotViet's product export works directly: headers are auto-mapped and conversion-unit rows are skipped. Map columns, preview, then confirm. Existing products are matched by code (SKU).
import.choose: Choose a CSV or Excel file
import.csvOnly: CSV (.csv) or Excel (.xlsx) — incl. KiotViet product export

errors.parse: Couldn't read the file. Use CSV or .xlsx.
errors.needName: Map the Product name column first.

errors.alreadyOpen: You already have an open shift.

internalUse.emptyForm: Search products above to add to this issue.

sepay.title: SePay / VietQR bank accounts
sepay.setupHelp: LumaPOS manages the webhook endpoint and server secret. Store users only add the receiving bank account here.
sepay.qrOnlyHelp: Users do not need to configure SePay to generate VietQR. Add a receiving bank account and LumaPOS will use the default account for POS checkout QR and printed slips.
sepay.notificationHelp: This optional feature uses SePay webhooks to receive incoming payment notifications and auto-confirm payments. Without SePay, POS can still generate manual VietQR from bank accounts.
sepay.setupStep1: In SePay, connect or enable the bank account that will receive transfers.
sepay.setupStep2: Add the same bank account below so LumaPOS can generate VietQR and match incoming webhooks.
sepay.setupStep3: Paste this webhook URL into SePay and choose HMAC-SHA256. The secret is configured in deployment env.
sepay.notifyStep1: In SePay, add a webhook pointing to the URL below.
sepay.notifyStep2: Choose HMAC-SHA256. The shared secret is configured in server env, not entered in store settings.
sepay.notifyStep3: When money arrives at the matching account with the payment reference, LumaPOS matches it and confirms the payment.
sepay.help: Configure one or more bank accounts for dynamic VietQR collection. Secrets stay on the server.
sepay.bankSearch: Search bank name, code, or BIN...
sepay.secretPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current value

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.cameraBuilderSubtitle: Choose cameras and configure a complete package for each installation point.
quotes.defaultNote: Genuine dedicated memory card, 24-month warranty. Price includes installation, app configuration and basic materials for each package. Extra costs are only applied after customer approval.
quotes.cameraPickerHint: The price below is for the camera only; memory card, labor and materials are not included.
quotes.emptyPackagesHint: Click “Add to quote” in the list on the left.

builderErrors.addCamera: Add at least one camera to the quote.

orderEdit.warning: Editing restores stock for old lines and deducts for new ones; debt adjusts by the difference. Orders with returns can't be edited.

errors.hasEInvoice: An e-invoice was issued — can't edit/cancel. Void the e-invoice first.
